description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-card` (T2-41). 4/6 libraries — content container.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-card/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, interactive/static mode typing, slot typing (image/heading/body/footer/actions), href prop for linked cards
2. Accessibility — interactive card: entire card clickable or actions inside (not both anti-pattern), heading slot uses correct heading level, image slot has alt, linked card has meaningful accessible name (not just "read more"), axe-core pass
3. Tests — static/interactive modes, all slots, click behavior, keyboard activation if interactive
4. Storybook — all slot combinations, interactive/static, horizontal/vertical layout
5. CSS — image aspect ratio, `--hx-*` tokens, hover/focus state for interactive, CSS parts (image, header, body, footer, actions)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, all slots server-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-card/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-card — T2-41 antagonistic quality review
